content: I am moving to a hotel temporarily, what are the tax implications?

I can help you update your address, but I'm not authorized to give tax advice. I can only warn you that state/local withholding may change.

Since you're moving to a hotel temporarily, are you wanting to update your home/residential address or your mailing address?
can you summarize what I have asked

You asked about the tax implications of moving to a hotel temporarily. I clarified that I can't offer tax advice, but I can help you update your address and warn you that state/local withholding may change. I also asked whether you want to update your home/residential address or your mailing address.
